example.target: Imam rezervaciju na ime Horvat.
example.gloss: I have a reservation under the name Horvat.

words.note: biaspectual, same form for both aspects

example.target: Rezervirali smo sobu za dvije noći.
example.gloss: We booked a room for two nights.

example.target: Tražimo jeftin smještaj blizu plaže.
example.gloss: We are looking for cheap accommodation near the beach.

words.note: holiday rental unit; a regular flat is 'stan'

example.target: Ljeti iznajmljujemo apartman u Splitu.
example.gloss: In summer we rent an apartment in Split.

example.target: Želim sobu s pogledom na more.
example.gloss: I want a room with a sea view.

example.target: Ključ ostavite na recepciji.
example.gloss: Leave the key at the reception.

example.target: Moja prtljaga je preteška.
example.gloss: My luggage is too heavy.

example.target: Nosim samo mali ruksak.
example.gloss: I am carrying only a small backpack.

example.target: Pogledaj vozni red na internetu.
example.gloss: Check the timetable on the internet.

example.target: Polazak vlaka je u osam sati.
example.gloss: The train's departure is at eight o'clock.

example.target: Čekamo dolazak autobusa iz Zadra.
example.gloss: We are waiting for the arrival of the bus from Zadar.

example.target: U Zagrebu presjedamo na drugi vlak.
example.gloss: In Zagreb we change to another train.

example.target: Vlak ima kašnjenje od dvadeset minuta.
example.gloss: The train has a delay of twenty minutes.

example.target: Čekam te na autobusnom stajalištu.
example.gloss: I am waiting for you at the bus stop.

example.target: Vlak za Rijeku polazi s drugog perona.
example.gloss: The train for Rijeka departs from platform two.

example.target: Zaboravio sam vozačku dozvolu kod kuće.
example.gloss: I forgot my driving licence at home.

example.target: Moram produžiti registraciju auta.
example.gloss: I have to renew the car's registration.

example.target: Stat ćemo na prvoj benzinskoj postaji.
example.gloss: We will stop at the first petrol station.

example.target: Nemamo dovoljno goriva za put.
example.gloss: We don't have enough fuel for the trip.

example.target: Pukla nam je guma na autocesti.
example.gloss: Our tyre burst on the motorway.

example.target: Auto je stao zbog kvara na motoru.
example.gloss: The car stopped because of an engine breakdown.

words.note: impf. kvariti se; also of food going bad

example.target: Auto nam se pokvario na putu.
example.gloss: Our car broke down on the way.

example.target: Vozimo se autocestom prema Splitu.
example.gloss: We are driving along the motorway towards Split.

example.target: Ova cesta vodi do malog sela.
example.gloss: This road leads to a small village.

example.target: Cestarinu možete platiti karticom.
example.gloss: You can pay the toll by card.

example.target: Trajekt za Hvar polazi u podne.
example.gloss: The ferry for Hvar departs at noon.

example.target: Veliki brodovi ulaze u luku.
example.gloss: Big ships are entering the port.

words.note: pf. odletjeti (fly off) / doletjeti (arrive by flying)

example.target: Sutra letimo za London.
example.gloss: Tomorrow we are flying to London.

example.target: Naš let kasni sat vremena.
example.gloss: Our flight is an hour late.

example.target: Avion polijeće za deset minuta.
example.gloss: The plane takes off in ten minutes.

example.target: Avion slijeće za pola sata.
example.gloss: The plane lands in half an hour.

example.target: Na carini smo čekali pola sata.
example.gloss: We waited at customs for half an hour.

example.target: Kupili smo putno osiguranje prije puta.
example.gloss: We bought travel insurance before the trip.

example.target: Dubrovnik ima mnogo znamenitosti.
example.gloss: Dubrovnik has many sights.

example.target: Vodič nam je pokazao stari grad.
example.gloss: The guide showed us the old town.

example.target: U nedjelju idemo na izlet.
example.gloss: On Sunday we are going on a trip.

example.target: Danas razgledavamo grad i muzeje.
example.gloss: Today we are sightseeing the city and the museums.

example.target: Ljeti u gradu ima puno turista.
example.gloss: In summer there are a lot of tourists in the city.

example.target: Turizam je vrlo važan za Hrvatsku.
example.gloss: Tourism is very important for Croatia.

words.note: for the four seasons see godišnje doba

example.target: Cijene su više u ljetnoj sezoni.
example.gloss: Prices are higher in the summer season.

words.note: noćenje s doručkom = bed and breakfast

example.target: Koliko košta noćenje s doručkom?
example.gloss: How much does a night with breakfast cost?

example.target: Spavamo u kampu pokraj mora.
example.gloss: We are sleeping in a campsite by the sea.

example.target: Postavili smo šator u kampu.
example.gloss: We pitched the tent at the campsite.

example.target: Ulaznica za muzej košta pet eura.
example.gloss: A ticket for the museum costs five euros.

example.target: Molim jednu povratnu kartu do Rijeke.
example.gloss: One return ticket to Rijeka, please.

example.target: Idete u krivom smjeru.
example.gloss: You are going in the wrong direction.

example.target: Odjava iz sobe je do deset sati.
example.gloss: Check-out from the room is by ten o'clock.

example.target: Putnici čekaju vlak na peronu.
example.gloss: The passengers are waiting for the train on the platform.

example.target: Kasno navečer stigli smo na odredište.
example.gloss: Late in the evening we arrived at the destination.

example.target: Stanujemo u samom središtu grada.
example.gloss: We live in the very centre of the city.

example.target: Kupili su kuću u predgrađu Zagreba.
example.gloss: They bought a house in a suburb of Zagreb.

example.target: Naše naselje je mirno i zeleno.
example.gloss: Our neighbourhood is quiet and green.

example.target: U ovoj četvrti ima puno kafića.
example.gloss: In this district there are a lot of cafés.

words.note: colloquial, very common in Zagreb speech

example.target: Odrastao sam u ovom kvartu.
example.gloss: I grew up in this neighbourhood.

example.target: Promet je jutros bio jako gust.
example.gloss: The traffic was very heavy this morning.

words.note: crowds of people or congested traffic

example.target: U centru je uvijek velika gužva.
example.gloss: There is always a big crowd in the centre.

example.target: Skrenite lijevo kod semafora.
example.gloss: Turn left at the traffic light.

example.target: Na raskrižju vozite polako.
example.gloss: Drive slowly at the intersection.

example.target: Na kružnom toku izađite na drugi izlaz.
example.gloss: At the roundabout take the second exit.

example.target: Pješaci čekaju zeleno svjetlo.
example.gloss: The pedestrians are waiting for the green light.

example.target: Auto je stao pred pješačkim prijelazom.
example.gloss: The car stopped in front of the pedestrian crossing.

example.target: Ne vozite bicikl po pločniku.
example.gloss: Do not ride a bicycle on the pavement.

example.target: Parkiralište iza zgrade je besplatno.
example.gloss: The car park behind the building is free.

example.target: Ovdje ne smijete parkirati.
example.gloss: You are not allowed to park here.

example.target: Prešli smo stari most preko rijeke.
example.gloss: We crossed the old bridge over the river.

example.target: Na trgu je spomenik banu Jelačiću.
example.gloss: On the square there is a monument to Ban Jelačić.

example.target: Turisti se fotografiraju kraj fontane.
example.gloss: Tourists take photos by the fountain.

example.target: S kule se vidi cijeli grad.
example.gloss: From the tower you can see the whole city.

example.target: Posjetili smo dvorac Trakošćan.
example.gloss: We visited Trakošćan Castle.

example.target: Stara tvrđava je iznad grada.
example.gloss: The old fortress is above the town.

example.target: Katedrala ima dva visoka tornja.
example.gloss: The cathedral has two tall towers.

example.target: Ovaj samostan je star petsto godina.
example.gloss: This monastery is five hundred years old.

example.target: Mirogoj je poznato zagrebačko groblje.
example.gloss: Mirogoj is a famous Zagreb cemetery.

example.target: U muzeju smo proveli dva sata.
example.gloss: We spent two hours in the museum.

example.target: U galeriji je otvorena nova izložba.
example.gloss: A new exhibition has opened in the gallery.

example.target: Kupila sam rječnik u knjižari.
example.gloss: I bought a dictionary in the bookshop.

example.target: Nađimo se u kafiću na trgu.
example.gloss: Let's meet in the café on the square.

example.target: Ujutro idem u pekarnicu po kruh.
example.gloss: In the morning I go to the bakery for bread.

example.target: U kvartu grade novi neboder.
example.gloss: They are building a new high-rise in the neighbourhood.

example.target: Navečer šetamo šetalištem uz more.
example.gloss: In the evening we walk along the seaside promenade.

example.target: Sjedili smo na klupi u parku.
example.gloss: We were sitting on a bench in the park.

example.target: Noću mi smeta buka s ulice.
example.gloss: At night the noise from the street bothers me.

example.target: Gradonačelnik je otvorio novi most.
example.gloss: The mayor opened the new bridge.

example.target: Stanovništvo našeg sela je sve starije.
example.gloss: The population of our village is getting older.

example.target: U okolici grada ima lijepih sela.
example.gloss: In the area around the city there are pretty villages.

example.target: Djed ima veliko imanje na selu.
example.gloss: Grandpa has a big property in the countryside.

example.target: U rujnu radimo u vinogradu.
example.gloss: In September we work in the vineyard.

example.target: Obitelj ima maslinik na otoku.
example.gloss: The family has an olive grove on the island.

example.target: Masline beremo krajem jeseni.
example.gloss: We pick olives at the end of autumn.

example.target: U voćnjaku rastu jabuke i kruške.
example.gloss: Apples and pears grow in the orchard.

example.target: Berba grožđa počinje u rujnu.
example.gloss: The grape harvest begins in September.

words.note: f. seljanka; can sound pejorative, neutral: poljoprivrednik

example.target: Seljaci prodaju povrće na tržnici.
example.gloss: Farmers sell vegetables at the market.

example.target: Poljoprivreda je važna za ovaj kraj.
example.gloss: Agriculture is important for this region.

example.target: Susjed vozi traktor kroz polje.
example.gloss: The neighbour is driving a tractor through the field.

example.target: Krave su preko zime u staji.
example.gloss: The cows are in the barn over the winter.

example.target: Kupujemo domaći sir i med.
example.gloss: We buy home-made cheese and honey.

example.target: Gradski autobus vozi svakih deset minuta.
example.gloss: The city bus runs every ten minutes.

example.target: Volim miran seoski život.
example.gloss: I love the quiet country life.

example.target: Zagađenje zraka je velik problem.
example.gloss: Air pollution is a big problem.

example.target: Otpad razvrstavamo u različite kante.
example.gloss: We sort waste into different bins.

example.target: Iznesi smeće prije večere, molim te.
example.gloss: Take out the rubbish before dinner, please.

example.target: Recikliramo papir, plastiku i staklo.
example.gloss: We recycle paper, plastic and glass.

example.target: U moru ima previše plastike.
example.gloss: There is too much plastic in the sea.

example.target: Staklo bacamo u zeleni kontejner.
example.gloss: We throw glass into the green container.

example.target: Ne bacajte smeće u prirodu.
example.gloss: Do not throw rubbish into nature.

example.target: Zaštita okoliša važna je svima.
example.gloss: Protection of the environment is important to everyone.

example.target: Zrak na planini je čist.
example.gloss: The air in the mountains is clean.

example.target: Rijeka je prljava zbog stare tvornice.
example.gloss: The river is dirty because of the old factory.

example.target: Klima na obali je blaga.
example.gloss: The climate on the coast is mild.

example.target: Svi danas govore o klimatskim promjenama.
example.gloss: Everyone talks about climate change today.

example.target: Vremenska prognoza za sutra je loša.
example.gloss: The weather forecast for tomorrow is bad.

example.target: Jutros je na cesti gusta magla.
example.gloss: This morning there is thick fog on the road.

example.target: Noćas je mraz uništio cvijeće.
example.gloss: Last night the frost destroyed the flowers.

example.target: Zbog poledice vozite vrlo oprezno.
example.gloss: Because of the ice, drive very carefully.

example.target: Sinoć nas je probudila jaka oluja.
example.gloss: Last night a strong storm woke us up.

example.target: Poslijepodne stiže kratki pljusak.
example.gloss: A short downpour is coming in the afternoon.

example.target: Naš pas se boji grmljavine.
example.gloss: Our dog is afraid of thunder.

example.target: Munja je udarila u staro drvo.
example.gloss: Lightning struck the old tree.

example.target: Tuča je uništila cijeli vinograd.
example.gloss: Hail destroyed the whole vineyard.

example.target: Poplava je zatvorila cestu uz rijeku.
example.gloss: The flood closed the road along the river.

example.target: Prošle godine pogodio nas je jak potres.
example.gloss: Last year a strong earthquake hit us.

example.target: Ovog ljeta suša je trajala tjednima.
example.gloss: This summer the drought lasted for weeks.

words.note: a large destructive fire; flame itself is vatra

example.target: Vatrogasci gase veliki požar u šumi.
example.gloss: Firefighters are putting out a big fire in the forest.

example.target: Ne palite vatru u šumi ljeti.
example.gloss: Do not light a fire in the forest in summer.

example.target: Zrak je danas topao i vlažan.
example.gloss: The air is warm and humid today.

words.note: also spelled 'suv' in other standards, Croatian is suh

example.target: Ljeto je bilo dugo i suho.
example.gloss: The summer was long and dry.

example.target: Nebo je danas sivo i oblačno.
example.gloss: The sky is grey and cloudy today.

words.note: vedro je = the sky is clear

example.target: Nebo je vedro, bez ijednog oblaka.
example.gloss: The sky is clear, without a single cloud.

example.target: Večeri su već svježe, ponesi jaknu.
example.gloss: The evenings are already cool, take a jacket.

example.target: Kolovoz je bio vruć i sparan.
example.gloss: August was hot and muggy.

example.target: Sutra će biti sunčan i topao dan.
example.gloss: Tomorrow will be a sunny and warm day.

example.target: Ožujak je često vjetrovit mjesec.
example.gloss: March is often a windy month.

example.target: Danas je dvadeset pet stupnjeva.
example.gloss: Today it is twenty-five degrees.

example.target: Ujutro je bilo minus pet stupnjeva.
example.gloss: In the morning it was minus five degrees.

example.target: Po ovoj vrućini ne izlazim iz kuće.
example.gloss: In this heat I am not leaving the house.

example.target: Hladnoća je stigla iznenada u studenom.
example.gloss: The cold arrived suddenly in November.

example.target: Pazi, na cesti je jutros led.
example.gloss: Careful, there is ice on the road this morning.

example.target: Poslije kiše pojavila se duga.
example.gloss: After the rain a rainbow appeared.

words.note: pf. puhnuti; famous Croatian winds: bura, jugo

example.target: Danas puše jaka bura.
example.gloss: A strong bora wind is blowing today.

words.note: pf. pasti; pada kiša/snijeg = it rains/snows

example.target: Kiša pada već tri dana.
example.gloss: It has been raining for three days already.

words.note: impersonal: sniježi = it is snowing; also: pada snijeg

example.target: Na planinama već sniježi.
example.gloss: It is already snowing in the mountains.

example.target: Smrzavam se, gdje su mi rukavice?
example.gloss: I am freezing, where are my gloves?

example.target: Snijeg se otopio za jedan dan.
example.gloss: The snow melted in one day.

example.target: Gledali smo zalazak sunca na plaži.
example.gloss: We watched the sunset on the beach.

example.target: Ustali smo prije izlaska sunca.
example.gloss: We got up before sunrise.

example.target: Valovi su danas preveliki za plivanje.
example.gloss: The waves are too big for swimming today.

words.note: plima = high tide, oseka = low tide

example.target: Plima i oseka na Jadranu nisu velike.
example.gloss: The tides in the Adriatic are not big.

example.target: Božić je moj najdraži blagdan.
example.gloss: Christmas is my favourite holiday.

example.target: Za praznike idemo baki na selo.
example.gloss: For the holidays we go to grandma's in the countryside.

example.target: Za Božić se cijela obitelj okuplja.
example.gloss: The whole family gathers for Christmas.

example.target: Na Badnjak kitimo božićno drvce.
example.gloss: On Christmas Eve we decorate the Christmas tree.

example.target: Za Uskrs bojimo jaja.
example.gloss: For Easter we dye eggs.

words.note: Sretna Nova godina! = Happy New Year!

example.target: Novu godinu slavimo s prijateljima.
example.gloss: We celebrate New Year with friends.

words.note: children get gifts in polished boots on 6 December

example.target: Sveti Nikola donosi darove u čizmicama.
example.gloss: St Nicholas brings gifts in little boots.

words.note: Advent u Zagrebu is a famous Christmas market

example.target: Zagrebački advent poznat je u cijeloj Europi.
example.gloss: The Zagreb Advent market is famous all over Europe.

example.target: U subotu slavim trideseti rođendan.
example.gloss: On Saturday I am celebrating my thirtieth birthday.

words.note: the feast day of the saint you are named after

example.target: Djed slavi imendan, a ne rođendan.
example.gloss: Grandpa celebrates his name day, not his birthday.

example.target: Sutra je deseta godišnjica našeg vjenčanja.
example.gloss: Tomorrow is the tenth anniversary of our wedding.

example.target: Pozvani smo na vjenčanje u lipnju.
example.gloss: We are invited to a wedding in June.

words.note: the celebration; the ceremony is vjenčanje

example.target: Svadba je trajala do ranog jutra.
example.gloss: The wedding party lasted until early morning.

example.target: Mladenci su otplesali prvi ples.
example.gloss: The newlyweds danced the first dance.

words.note: f. kuma; a very close family bond in Croatia

example.target: Brat mi je bio kum na vjenčanju.
example.gloss: My brother was my best man at the wedding.

example.target: U nedjelju je krštenje naše kćeri.
example.gloss: On Sunday is our daughter's christening.

example.target: Na sprovod je došlo cijelo selo.
example.gloss: The whole village came to the funeral.

example.target: Baka svake nedjelje ide na misu.
example.gloss: Grandma goes to mass every Sunday.

example.target: Svaki kraj ima svoje stare običaje.
example.gloss: Every region has its old customs.

example.target: Ta tradicija je stara sto godina.
example.gloss: That tradition is a hundred years old.

example.target: Hvala ti na prekrasnom daru!
example.gloss: Thank you for the wonderful gift!

words.note: pf. pokloniti; + dat. of the receiver

example.target: Prijateljima uvijek poklanjam knjige.
example.gloss: I always give my friends books as gifts.

words.note: biaspectual; čestitati komu na čemu (dat. + na + loc.)

example.target: Čestitali smo sestri na diplomi.
example.gloss: We congratulated my sister on her degree.

example.target: Poslali smo baki božićnu čestitku.
example.gloss: We sent grandma a Christmas card.

example.target: Sretan rođendan i sve najbolje!
example.gloss: Happy birthday and all the best!

example.target: Večeras slavimo mamin rođendan.
example.gloss: Tonight we are celebrating mum's birthday.

example.target: Proslava je bila u restoranu kraj mora.
example.gloss: The celebration was in a restaurant by the sea.

words.en: to toast / to raise a glass
words.note: impf. nazdravljati; the toast itself: Živjeli!

example.target: Nazdravili smo mladencima šampanjcem.
example.gloss: We toasted the newlyweds with champagne.

words.note: f. gošća; pl. gosti, gen. pl. gostiju

example.target: Gosti dolaze oko sedam sati.
example.gloss: The guests are coming around seven o'clock.

example.target: Domaćin je dočekao goste na vratima.
example.gloss: The host welcomed the guests at the door.

words.note: collective singular; one relative: rođak / rođakinja

example.target: Na svadbi je bila sva rodbina.
example.gloss: All the relatives were at the wedding.

example.target: Pozivnice šaljemo mjesec dana ranije.
example.gloss: We send the invitations a month in advance.

example.target: Pozvali smo trideset gostiju.
example.gloss: We invited thirty guests.

words.note: ići u posjet komu = to go visit somebody

example.target: Idemo u posjet djedu i baki.
example.gloss: We are going to visit grandpa and grandma.

example.target: Za blagdane ćemo posjetiti rodbinu.
example.gloss: For the holidays we will visit our relatives.

example.target: Cijela obitelj okupila se oko stola.
example.gloss: The whole family gathered around the table.

example.target: Mama je ispekla čokoladnu tortu.
example.gloss: Mum baked a chocolate cake.

example.target: Puhni svijeće i zaželi želju!
example.gloss: Blow out the candles and make a wish!

example.target: Kupili smo nove ukrase za bor.
example.gloss: We bought new ornaments for the Christmas tree.

example.target: Okitili smo bor prije Badnjaka.
example.gloss: We decorated the Christmas tree before Christmas Eve.

example.target: U ponoć počinje veliki vatromet.
example.gloss: At midnight the big fireworks begin.

words.note: the Rijeka carnival is the most famous in Croatia

example.target: Djeca se vesele maškarama u veljači.
example.gloss: The children look forward to the carnival in February.

example.target: U kući je vladalo veliko veselje.
example.gloss: Great joy reigned in the house.

example.target: Priredili smo mu iznenađenje za rođendan.
example.gloss: We prepared a surprise for his birthday.

example.target: Ukrasili smo sobu šarenim balonima.
example.gloss: We decorated the room with colourful balloons.

example.target: U ponoć otvaramo šampanjac.
example.gloss: At midnight we open the champagne.

example.target: Na svadbi smo pjevali stare pjesme.
example.gloss: At the wedding we sang old songs.

example.target: Ispunila mi se najveća želja.
example.gloss: My biggest wish came true.

words.en: to make a wish / to wish
words.note: impf. željeti; zaželjeti želju = to make a wish

example.target: Zaželjela je želju i puhnula svijeće.
example.gloss: She made a wish and blew out the candles.

example.target: Slavljenik je dobio puno darova.
example.gloss: The birthday boy got a lot of presents.
